+{

+    "title": "k3s: k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when starting as systemd service",
+    "description": "k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when starting as systemd service. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify k3s troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your k3s deployment:\n```bash\nk3s --version\nsystemctl status k3s\njournalctl -u k3s --no-pager --lines=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for error: `code = Unavailable desc = all SubConns are in TransientFailure, latest connection error: connection error: desc = \\\"tran`"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review k3s configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant k3s configuration:\n```bash\nk3s --version\nkubectl get nodes -o wide\nkubectl get pods -A\n```\nA clear and concise description of what the bug is."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when starting\u2026",
+        "description": "https://github.com/rancher/k3s/issues/478\n```yaml\nMay 29 21:45:08 cubi002 k3s[10211]: time=\"2019-05-29T21:45:08.124306382Z\" level=debug msg=\"Wrote ping\"\nMay 29 21:45:08 cubi002 k3s[10211]: time=\"2019-05-29T21:45:08.505468246Z\" level=debug msg=\"FIXME: Got an status-code for which error does not match any expected type!!!: -1\" module=api status_code=-1\nMay 29 21:45:08 cubi002 k3s[10211]: time=\"2019-05-29T21:45:08.505845147Z\" level=debug msg=\"FIXME: Got an status-code for which error does not match any expected type!!!: -1\" module=api status_code=-1\nMay 29 21:45:13 cubi002 k3s[10211]: time=\"2019-05-29T21:45:13.124379839Z\" level=debug msg=\"Wrote \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm k3s 0.5 agent node fail to create nginx pod when\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\njournalctl -u k3s --no-pager --lines=50 --since='5 minutes ago'\nkubectl get events -A --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that `code = Unavailable desc = all SubConns are in TransientFailure, latest connection error: connection error: desc = \\\"tran` no longer appears in logs."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/k3s-io/k3s/pull/639",
+      "codeSnippets": [

+        "curl -sfL https://get.k3s.io | sh -",
+        "curl -sfL https://get.k3s.io | K3S_URL=https://x.x.x.x:6443 K3S_TOKEN=xxxxx sh -"
